metadata.title: Afera, CD Projekt, Kiciński, Onet, Kordys: Ayahuasca and Dark Investigation
metadata.description: Afera, CD Projekt, Kiciński, Onet, Kordys. Death during Ayahuasca ceremony, covering tracks and shocking behind-the-scenes of CD Projekt creators.
metadata.og_alt: Creators of 'The Witcher' and their shamans. Death of a ceremony participant Ayahuasca.
metadata.schema_headline: Afera CD Projekt: Kiciński, Ayahuasca and Dark Investigation
metadata.schema_description: Death during Ayahuasca ceremony, covering tracks and shocking behind-the-scenes of CD Projekt creators.

page.h1: Afera CD Projekt: Kiciński, Ayahuasca and Dark Investigation
page.lead: Ayahuasca, police raids and a tragedy that no one was supposed to find out about. Publicly available files and registers reveal how the creators of 'The Witcher' funded the shamanic underground.

article.drop_cap: In 2020, media reports spread about the breakup of a group of Polish shamans in the Czech Hermanovice. A police raid, the arrest of Jarosław and Karolina Kordys, and then harsh sentences – 8.5 and 5.5 years in prison for running an illegal business consisting in the organization of so-called ceremonies during which clients were given an exotic psychedelic – ayahuasca.
article.p2: Ayahuasca is a traditional brew from Amazonian plants with a strong hallucinogenic effect. Due to the high content of DMT – a psychedelic substance that causes intense visions and changes in the state of consciousness – its possession and administration is prohibited in Poland and the Czech Republic. The finale of the Kordys' media spectacle was their pardon by the Czech president after two years of serving their sentence.
article.p3: The curtain fell, the topic went quiet. But is this really the end of the story? In the shadow of this loud trial, a second one was taking place – quiet and lightning fast, ending with a discreet verdict that no one in the media even mentioned. Analysis of court documents leads to amazing conclusions.
article.p4: In the border town of Janov, there was a second, twin ayahuasca center, whose co-owner turned out to be a billionaire – Michał Kiciński.
article.witness_intro: In the extensive and publicly available justification of Jarosław Kordys' sentence, the figure of witness Bartosz B. appears. According to the files:
article.witness_transcript_content: Witness B., regarding the person of the accused [Jarosław Kordys], stated that he has known him for about 8 years, and they met in the Netherlands. Witness B. confirmed that he himself had conducted workshops in the past, and currently he himself is the subject of a police investigation in Krnov precisely because of the ceremony.
article.charges_intro: The files also reveal the scale of the charges against Bartosz B.:
article.charges_content: (...) the aforementioned was being checked in connection with the crime of illegal production and other handling of narcotic drugs (...) because in 2014 he was to order the sending to his address of a postal shipment intercepted at the airport in Leipzig, Germany, containing 4.5 kg of DMT, and on 6.6.2018 a postal shipment containing 2000 g of mescaline and 38.6 g of DMT substance was intercepted in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
article.ownership_intro: An intriguing fragment concerns the ownership of the base. The documents state:
article.ownership_content:
(...) family building in the town of Janov (...), which is partially used for permanent residence, and partially as a commercial accommodation facility.

Witness [Bartosz B.] confirmed that in Janov he owns one-tenth of the property.
article.ownership_conclusion:
In the Czech Republic, land registers are public and for a small fee you can download its historical extract. The downloaded document leaves no doubt: in the years 2012–2023 the co-owners of the ayahuasca property were:

Bartosz Badowski (10%) and Michał Dawid Kiciński (90%)
article.ownership_remark: The second name – Dawid – perfectly fills the gap in the anonymized abbreviation Michał D. K.
article.ownership_highlight: The shaman's partner was the creator of The Witcher – one of the richest Poles.
article.wiretap_intro: The breakthrough in the case of the organizers of ayahuasca ceremonies in 2020 came thanks to police operational techniques. Kordys' phone was constantly tapped, and officers listened live when on 24.08.2020 there was a nervous exchange of words between Badowski and Kordys.
article.wiretap_p2: Kordys called Badowski clearly concerned about the news that reached him. He was afraid that the tragedy that was buzzing in the corridors could destroy their empire. The court in the justification of the sentence precisely reconstructs this moment:
article.reconstruction_content: the accused [Jarosław Kordys] discusses with B. that information reached him that in the facility in Janov some woman died.
article.wiretap_p3: In the conversation, there is also a thread of threat from a third person – the men discuss a blackmailer who wants to go to the police. Kordys directly asks his partner:
article.kordys_question_content: In what danger is our work?
article.wiretap_quote: „Their conversation shows that they were not essentially concerned with the fact of death itself, but rather with the fear that it would not attract the attention of the police.”
article.wiretap_p4: For the court, it was crown proof that the accused were running an illegal business, not spiritual activities – the death of a human was for them only a disruption of business.
article.wiretap_p5: The cynicism of this conversation reaches its peak a moment later. As soon as they set a strategy to silence the rumors, they immediately moved to the logistics of drug deliveries. The court notes that right after the speculations about death and blackmail, the interlocutors return to business:
article.continuation_content: Next in the conversation they discuss orders of «tea» from the jungle and whether they will «not spoil» it for them, getting excited about the recording from the supplier who «is sitting in the jungle and cooking».
article.wiretap_p6: For the policemen who heard this in real time, the message was clear: a tragedy could have occurred in the facility, and the perpetrators were only worried about the continuity of supplies.
article.wiretap_p7: Just two days after this phone call, on 26.08.2020, Czech police entered the property in Janov. The results of the search are described in Kordys' sentence:
article.search_report_content: in the property things were secured... in addition to marijuana, substances containing DMT with a volume of about 2 kg were also secured.
article.search_p2: During the police intervention, 15 Polish citizens who were supposed to participate in the ceremony were identified there. Among them, regulars and close friends of Badowski – Krzysztof Stefanek and Magdalena Drzewińska, whose presence at the moment of the entry of the services is significant in the context of their later role in this story.
article.freedom_p1: When on August 26, 2020, Czech police entered the property in Janov, belonging to Bartosz Badowski and billionaire Michał Kiciński, Jarosław Kordys in Hermanovice still felt safe. He did not know yet that the clock had started counting down the time to his own disaster. Just 7 weeks after the quiet raid on Badowski, the police knocked on the Kordys' door.
article.freedom_p2: On October 15, 2020, the idyll in their center was interrupted by the sound of stun grenades. The Czech anti-terrorist unit did not play around: masked officers with long weapons stormed into the building, throwing future heroes of a loud scandal to the ground.
article.arrest_video_label: Recording from the police raid on the center in Hermanovice (15.10.2020)
article.freedom_p3: What happened in those less than two months? The answer lies in one Czech legal term:
article.freedom_p4: Bartosz „Badi” Badowski, a partner of one of the richest Poles, quickly understood his position. In the face of secured evidence – including 2 kilograms of substances with DMT and marijuana – he chose a strategy that was to save him from many years in prison. He decided to buy his freedom.
article.freedom_p5: The settlement allowed for the closing of his file without calling witnesses, which in practice meant that the mechanisms of operation of the Janov center never echoed in the public debate, protecting Badowski from the crossfire of questions and testimonies that could also sink his quiet partner.
article.freedom_p6: The price of Badowski's freedom turned out to be high for his colleague from the industry. Badi's testimony was priceless evidence for the prosecutor's office, which allowed to close the chain of circumstantial evidence in the Kordys' case.
article.freedom_p7: Under the sentence of November 2, 2021, Bartosz Badowski was found guilty of committing the crime of illegal production and other handling of narcotic drugs.
article.badowski_sentence_title: Findings of the sentencing verdict of Bartosz B.
article.badowski_sentence_content:
at least from an unspecified date in 2015 to 26.08.2020 [...] offered, organized and in at least 441 cases realized in irregular intervals four-day and ten-day stays [...] focused on so-called spiritual exercises

provided participants with an unspecified amount of psychotropic substances for use, namely so-called ayahuasca containing dimethyltryptamine (DMT) and so-called marijuana containing tetrahydrocannabinol (THC)

stored a total of 1902.79 grams of plant material (...), which contained a total of 37.24 grams of the active substance dimethyltryptamine (DMT) and 92.29 grams of the so-called drug marijuana.
article.freedom_p8: While Jarosław Kordys was sentenced to 8.5 years of imprisonment, Bartosz Badowski, whose case concerned the same practice, the same substances, region and duration of activity, thanks to the settlement and cooperation with justice, ended the case with a suspended sentence.
article.silence_p1: Although Badowski stopped conducting shamanic activities, the property in Janov did not empty – the previously mentioned Krzysztof Stefanek and Magdalena Drzewińska moved in with him. Their presence at Badi's side at that time casts a shadow on their later role; they were not innocent observers, but people who, despite being present during the police intervention, remained loyal to the former shaman.
article.silence_p2: Being so close to Badowski, they perfectly knew the dark secret of Ilona's death. Their decision to live with a man who, in the face of tragedy, worried about the continuity of supplies, proves that they fully accepted the rules of the conspiracy of silence.
article.kicinski_p1: In the shadow of these verdicts, the unexplained role of the quiet partner remains. Michał Kiciński is not a figure who only heard about ayahuasca – he became its unofficial ambassador in the Polish mainstream media. In numerous interviews (e.g. for Focus, Newsweek), he describes the mechanisms of action of psychedelics with extraordinary precision. Kiciński publicly talks about the lessons of humility that medicine gave him, about meetings with shamans and about how the brew from the jungle opens a new reality.
article.mistake_p1: Michał Kiciński's confrontation with law enforcement agencies took formal shape in the autumn of 2023. On September 21, 2023, the billionaire personally received a summons to appear for questioning as a witness. It was to take place on 18.10.2023. It was clearly written on the summons that the questioning would concern Janov.
article.mistake_p2: The billionaire's reaction to the interest of law enforcement agencies was instantaneous. He turned directly to the author of the notification – sending him an email with a proposal of a kind of penance. Instead of prosecutor's explanations, he offered a transfer to a charitable cause, calling the years of illegal practice youthful naivety.
article.kicinski_email_content: (...) Yes, I can pay for my mistake with Badi. Give me a Foundation or Association (preferably associated with a hospice or orphanages, because here I see a sea of needs and a lot of suffering) and I will voluntarily pay the amount of the donation, as part of an Apology to the universe, for my youthful naivety and lack of insight. The Foundation / Association must be recognized and with traditions, not some dummy organization. I will send you a confirmation of the transfer.
article.mistake_p3: The questioning took place a week before the deadline indicated on the summons – October 11, 2023 at 3:00 PM at the District Police Headquarters Warsaw II. In the protocol, Kiciński adopts a line based on a lack of awareness as to the nature of the activities conducted on his farm.
article.kicinski_testimony_content: I have no knowledge of what was happening on my farm, in which I am a 90% shareholder (...) I rented this property.
article.mistake_p4: When in the course of activities the key question about his own participation in ayahuasca ceremonies in Janov was asked, the answer was laconic:
article.kicinski_participation_title: Answer to the question about participation
article.kicinski_participation_content: I did not participate in such ceremonies in the years 2016-2023, and about the earlier period I refuse to answer
article.mistake_p5: In the context of the submitted testimonies, it is worth noting that the billionaire is the owner of the luxury Munay Sonqo resort in Peru, which he mentioned many times in interviews.
article.mistake_p6: Unlike in Europe, Peruvian law allows for commercial conducting of ceremonies with ayahuasca. Kiciński's resort until now offers a fully public and professional sale of services with a profile twin to those that are prohibited in the Czech Republic, which is still exposed on the website.
article.mistake_p7: The fact that Kiciński at the time of questioning managed a legal ayahuasca business in South America calls into question his declared lack of awareness as to the profile of activities in Janov.
article.badowski_quote_intro: Here is how the cooperation is described by Bartosz Badowski himself:
article.badowski_quote_content: I sent the transfers from my ING account, which I have until now [...]. Title 'rent'. (...) As long as I earned - I shared the profit. (...) Michał knew exactly what was happening on the farm and reaped the profits from it for many many years. (...) I am also considering a visit to the Police in the Czech Republic - I suffered legal consequences for conducting ceremonies, but Kiciński - none. Although it was him who reaped the greatest profits from it, he was above me and was the majority owner of the farm.
article.philanthropist_p1: In November 2025, a film recorded a year earlier appears on the YouTube channel Osada Natury Zew, in which the current host, Krzysztof Stefanek, spins a tale about the creation of the Settlement. In an idyllic scenery, with a smile on his face, he builds a narrative about a wonderful coincidence and a mysterious benefactor.
article.philanthropist_p2: Stefanek recalls how together with a group of friends he helped to tidy up ownership issues so that the facility was in one hands. Stefanek dates the key moment of this story with extraordinary precision:
article.stefanek_quote_content: Ultimately on October 23, 2023 this man called us and said that together with his wife they decided that they would like to give this place as a donation
article.philanthropist_p3: Stefanek presents this as the effect of the donor's research, who was allegedly charmed by the vision of non-profit activity.
article.stefanek_video_label: Krzysztof Stefanek talks about miraculously receiving a donation (Material from 2025)
article.philanthropist_p4: However, the calendar of legal events shatters this romantic myth, revealing a nervous haste in getting rid of a hot potato:
article.timeline_1: Michał Kiciński receives a summons for questioning in the Janov case.
article.timeline_2: A week before the visit to the police headquarters, he buys back from Bartosz Badowski his 10% shares in the property for 160 thousand zlotys. To get rid of the whole center with one signature, he must first become its sole owner.
article.timeline_3: The billionaire stands before the police. To the protocol, he refuses to testify about his past in this place.
article.timeline_4: Just 12 days after the troublesome questioning, when the ownership formalities with Badi are already completed, a call follows to Stefanek with a proposal to give away assets worth millions for free.
article.timeline_5: The finale of the operation. Kiciński formally transfers Janov in the form of a donation. The property goes to a non-profit association – a dummy organization, managed by people who for years were part of this practice. The billionaire gets rid of the evidence, and the new owners gain a base for further activity under a new name.
article.philanthropist_p5: The cynicism of this situation is deepened by the fact that the recipients were not random ecology enthusiasts. Krzysztof Stefanek, who in the film talks about inverted logic and the beauty of volunteering, and his partner Magdalena Drzewińska in reality perfectly knew the dark history of Janov and the secret of Ilona's death. By accepting the donation, they were taking over not only the land, but also the silence.
article.philanthropist_p6: Ultimately, the strategy proved effective. The investigation was discontinued before it began, and the assets that could be subject to forfeiture as an instrument of crime were safely parked in the association. Kiciński remained an anonymous philanthropist, and Stefanek – the guardian of the new, clean settlement.
article.philanthropist_p7: On the tragedy, people consciously enriched themselves for whom covering up the truth became the foundation of their new, lucrative reality. Under the name of the non-profit organization Stowarzyszenie Natury Zew, Michał Baciński, Stefanek and Drzewińska later lived from organizing leisure stays with a list of donations instead of receipts, lying to their guests and publicly to everyone who comes across their idyllic films. And after all, the compensation to the universe was supposed to go to a hospice, not to a dummy organization.
article.nydek_p1: If the case concerned only one billionaire, one could speak of coincidence or an unlucky choice of tenants. However, slightly further from Janov, in the town of Nýdek, there was another, twin center.
article.nydek_p2: Witness reports indicate that regular ceremonies of a nature similar to those at the Kordys' and Badowski's were held in the property in Nýdek, conducted by Piotr Bonawentura Tracz. Although the center's website no longer exists, the internet archive Wayback Machine has preserved snapshots of the tribunydek.com website. Workshop descriptions clearly indicate that the property was used for work with psychedelics.
article.nydek_q: Since we already know what this house was, the key question becomes: who did it belong to?
article.nydek_p3: The analysis of Czech land registers brings a sensational discovery. The owner of this next shamanic temple – precisely at the time when the website invited to ceremonies – was the second of the duo of billionaires behind the gaming giant, Marcin Iwiński. Official documents mercilessly link his name with the infrastructure in which the illegal practice took place.
article.nydek_highlight: This means that not one but both legendary founders of CD Projekt, on the Czech border, owned properties in which the same illegal substances were offered for a fee.
article.nydek_p4: Even more puzzling is what happened to this property at the time of danger. When Kordys was arrested on 15.10.2020, the specter of police raids hung over the community. Official documents reveal a disturbing coincidence of dates:
article.nydek_timeline_1: Marcin Iwiński purchases a property in Nydke for the amount of 5,000,000.00 CZK. This property is used to organize illegal ceremonies using psychedelics administered to participants by Piotr Tracz.
article.nydek_timeline_2: Police storming of the Kordys center. Panic breaks out in the community.
article.nydek_timeline_3: Marcin Iwiński „sells” the properties in Nýdek.
article.nydek_p5: The buyer of the luxury property was not another investor, but Piotr Tracz himself – the same man who previously served there in the role of a shaman.
article.nydek_p6: This transaction raises doubts: how did a niche shaman fund the purchase of a luxury villa from one of the richest Poles? The new owner almost immediately changed the formal profile of activity to legal body work workshops. The coincidence of this sequence of events with Kiciński's donation in Janov allows us to see a repetitive pattern of owners withdrawing from infrastructure related to illegal practice.
article.wiktor_p1: March 9, 2026 Onet reveals to the public the shocking behind-the-scenes of the center's activities in the Czech Janov. The journalistic investigation focuses on the death of a 54-year-old participant, Ilona L.-H.
article.wiktor_p2: According to Onet's findings, in June 2018, a tragedy occurred on the farm in Janov. During a night ceremony using ayahuasca, the woman felt terrible, struggling with severe pain and intense vomiting. Despite her critical condition, the organizer did not call for medical help. Participants' phones were taken earlier, which made it impossible for them to alert the rescue services on their own.
article.wiktor_p3: The conductor of the rite, Wiktor B., brother of Bartosz Badowski, was under the influence of marijuana that night. Witness reports show that after the woman's death he took immediate actions aimed at covering up the incident. He ordered the participants to leave the center immediately. He presented a false version of events to the Czech police, claiming that Ilona L.-H. was only a guest and was found dead in the bathroom in the morning. The services initially did not become suspicious, accepting this account as credible.
article.wiktor_p4: Some time after the tragic night, Wiktor B. called a meeting for the traumatized participants of the fatal ceremony, in which his colleague Joanna N. helped him to lead. They were then convinced that for the common good the events of that night should remain a secret.
article.wiktor_p5: Over the following years, the lying narrative was successfully maintained. Even Ilona's closest family was convinced of death from natural causes for a long time.
article.wiktor_p6: The situation changed only on May 6, 2024, when the District Prosecutor's Office in Częstochowa launched an official investigation into the activities of the center and the circumstances of Ilona L.-H.'s death. Just 2 months later, Wiktor B. dies in mysterious circumstances.
article.wiktor_p7: The man's body was found in the warehouse of the company where he worked at the assembly of server cabinets. No visible injuries indicating the use of physical force were found on his body. Although more than a year and a half has passed since Wiktor B.'s death, investigators are still waiting for the results of toxicological tests, which are of key importance for explaining whether there were substances in the man's body that could contribute to his sudden departure. For this reason, the investigation into his mysterious death remains currently suspended.
article.legal_ceremonies_title: Investigation into the organization of ceremonies
article.legal_death_ilona_title: Investigation into the death of Ilona L.
article.legal_death_wiktor_title: Investigation into the death of Wiktor B.
article.legal_supervision: Supervision over the cases in Częstochowa was taken by the Deputy District Prosecutor
article.sources_lead: The article was created on the basis of public official and court documentation. Below is a full list of signatures and links enabling independent verification.
article.source_onet_title: Shamanic ceremonies, mysterious death and billionaires from 'The Witcher'
article.source_kataster_note: Note: Disclosure of personal data of the parties to the transaction requires logging in via the 'Identita občana' option, choosing login via eIDAS.

prokuratura.lead_wa: Wałbrzych, a city known for its mysterious undergrounds and legends about the gold train, has become the arena of events that could serve as a script for a crime comedy, were it not for the fact that they strike at the very foundations of the justice system. In the heart of the city, in the building of the District Prosecutor's Office, a series of burglaries occurred that exposed the helplessness of security systems.
prokuratura.p1: It all started with a seemingly ordinary, though audacious theft. Unknown perpetrators, taking advantage of the lack of modern monitoring, got into the prosecutor's office archive. However, money or valuable electronic equipment did not fall as their loot. The thieves came for something much more valuable – for paper.
prokuratura.p2: From the armored cabinets, which turned out to be armored only in name, the files of several multi-threaded economic investigations evaporated. Prosecutors who came to work the next day found only empty folders and an open window.
prokuratura.report_content: Violation of the security seals on the door to the main archive was found. No signs of the use of explosives. The locks were opened using a so-called 'master key'. The entire content of paper documentation together with electronic media was removed from the cabinets marked with signatures PR 123/2023 and PR 456/2023.
prokuratura.p3: A scandal broke out. Local media buzzed about the incompetence of investigators, and the District Prosecutor's Office immediately launched an explanatory proceeding. A special operational group was appointed, whose task was to find the perpetrators and – what is more important – to recover the stolen files.
prokuratura.p4: The new proceeding, conducted under strict supervision, was to be proof that the system can draw conclusions. The files of the new case, concerning the burglary into the prosecutor's office, became a priority. Guards were questioned, telephone connections were analyzed, fingerprints were collected.
prokuratura.spokesman_quote: It was a slap in the face of the state. We will not rest until the perpetrators stand before the court and the files return to their place.
prokuratura.p5: For a few weeks it seemed that the breakthrough was close. Investigators collected a large amount of evidence, including the testimony of an incognito witness who allegedly saw the fleeing perpetrators. All this valuable information went into a new, bulky folder marked with the signature PR 999/2024 - Case of Stolen Files.
prokuratura.p6: History likes to repeat itself, but in Wałbrzych it repeated itself as a farce. Exactly on the anniversary of the first burglary, the perpetrators struck again. This time they were not looking for economic files. Their goal was one: the files of the case concerning their own burglary.
prokuratura.p7: The burglars showed no small sense of humor or extreme insolence. Not only did they steal the documentation of the PR 999/2024 investigation, but in the empty cabinet they left a note with a short inscription: "Thank you for collecting the evidence. It helped us a lot."
prokuratura.report2_content: In the course of the inspection, the lack of folders with the signature PR 999/2024 was found. The perpetrators got into the building the same way as before. The alarm system, which was supposed to be modernized, was still in the testing phase and did not record the event.
prokuratura.conclusion_h: The situation became absurd. The prosecutor's office in Wałbrzych now had to launch a third investigation – in the case of the theft of files concerning the theft of files.
prokuratura.conclusion_highlight: The thieves effectively "cleaned" their record, using the hands of the prosecutors themselves for this.
prokuratura.legal_note_recidivism: A term coined by local lawyers to describe the practice of repeatedly robbing the same institution of documentation incriminating the perpetrators.
prokuratura.p8: To this day it has not been established how it is possible that the building of the prosecutor's office was so poorly secured. Was it the result of simple negligence, or maybe a deliberate action of someone from the inside? One thing is certain – in Wałbrzych, case files have an extraordinary tendency to disappear precisely when they become most dangerous for criminals.
prokuratura.prokuratura_lead: Burglaries, thefts and disappearing documentation. How the perpetrators robbed the prosecutor's office of the files of the investigation conducted against themselves.
prokuratura.prokuratura_meta_title: Burglary into the Prosecutor's Office in Wałbrzych. Disappearing files.
prokuratura.prokuratura_meta_desc: Audacious burglaries into the District Prosecutor's Office in Wałbrzych. The perpetrators stole the files of their own case.
